name: Kleptocopter
notes: First troop to pair stealth with resource_siphon rather than combat. Unlike Signal Ridge's Disruptor (same aura family, suppress_targeting instead of resource_siphon) it never needs an escort: stealth lets it slip into an enemy base alone and redirect a Resource building's output for as long as it sits in range. No revealsOnAttack — canTarget is empty, so it never attacks and can never break its own cloak that way; only stumbling within a detector's range or a non-detector's revealRange exposes it. Fuel upkeep (3) is on the heavier end for Air, reflecting the cloaking hardware, same reasoning as Ghost Tank's Fuel cost among Land vehicles.
